title: MANUU Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 04 Assistant Professor Posts
description: The Maulana Azad National Urdu University (MANUU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 04 Assistant Professor Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Post-graduation can apply for the MANUU Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, sele...
